title: How this Product became an INSTANT HIT!
description:

👉VIDEO INTRODUCTION:

Manish Chowdhary (Co-founder, WOW Skin Science) reveals how the craze for Garcinia Cambogia took off.
The demand exploded so fast that 20,000 bottles sold out before the brand even realised what was happening.

To know more such insights, watch the full episode on Think School Hindi by Zero 1.
